overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city street. The player moves past neon-lit buildings including the Empathy nightclub with its distinctive green dragon sculpture, encounters pedestrians, and approaches futuristic vehicles parked along the wet pavement. The scene features heavy rainfall, holographic advertisements, and towering glass architecture characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked futuristic city street with heavy downpour. The camera walks forward past a pedestrian in a red hoodie who passes very close by. Tall glass towers rise on the left while the Empathy nightclub with its green neon dragon sculpture dominates the right side. Palm trees line the center of the wet paved street.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the right side of the street, moving closer to the Empathy nightclub. The building's glass canopy entrance and exterior stairs become visible. A pedestrian in a tank top passes by on the right. The palm trees and street lamps from the previous segment fall behind as the camera focuses on the nightclub's detailed facade.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward as the street opens up to reveal parked vehicles and distant architecture. A purple sports car becomes visible on the left, parked along the curb. In the distance, a massive circular stadium structure and an elevated walkway become prominent. The Empathy nightclub remains visible on the right but begins to recede as the camera moves past it.

agents.ego_description: continuing past the parked cars toward the intersection where a red car is driving ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the purple sports car and continues toward an intersection. A red sports car is now visible driving ahead on the road. The Empathy nightclub recedes into the background on the right while the elevated walkway approaches. The large circular stadium remains visible in the distance as the camera moves through the rain toward the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from the neon glow of a nightclub to a wide urban intersection. It begins amidst a heavy downpour, passing a pedestrian in a red hoodie while tall glass towers and the green neon dragon of the Empathy nightclub frame the wet pavement. As the camera advances, the palm trees and street lamps recede, bringing the nightclub's glass canopy and exterior stairs into sharp focus as another pedestrian passes by. The scene then opens up to reveal a purple sports car parked along the curb and a massive circular stadium looming in the distance. Finally, the camera moves past the vehicle and toward a crossing, leaving the nightclub behind as a red sports car drives ahead toward an elevated walkway under the persistent rain.
